No Poverty.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course name 'NCCU SPORTXMAN' and focus on '運動' (sports) strongly infer a link to promoting physical and mental well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3). Lectures by industry experts and focus on '運動產業' develop relevant skills for employment (4.4). It also fosters critical thinking (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core focus on '運動產業' and sharing '實務經驗' directly prepares students for decent work and contributes to economic growth in the sector (Targets 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course supports the '運動產業' by developing human capital and sharing knowledge about its '不同領域', aligning with sustainable industrialization (Target 9.2).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The mention of '社會服務' is too vague and optional to establish a strong link to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to peace, justice, or strong institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to '建立政大x運動x人的聯繫網絡' through '校友業師講座', demonstrating multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.16).
